title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
innovation_summary: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization.
